# Ananya Kalia - Software Developer & AI Engineer Portfolio

Ananya Kalia is an aspiring software developer driven by curiosity and a desire to create real-world impact through technology. Specializes in building systems across web, computer vision, and machine learning domains.

## Metadata & Contact
- Name: Ananya Kalia
- Website: https://ananyakalia.com
- Location: Mumbai, India
- Role: Co-Curator, Speaker, Developer
- GitHub: https://github.com/ananyakalia
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ananyakalia

## Featured Projects

### IMPROVYU AI Interviewer
- Award: Winner, Model Forge 2025 ML
- Description: An advanced computer vision AI that conducts mock interviews. Leverages MediaPipe and OpenCV to evaluate facial postures, speech timing, and response structures in real-time.
- Tech Stack: Python, OpenCV, MediaPipe, AI/ML, Flask
- GitHub: https://github.com/ananyakalia/improvyu

### Renewable Site Optimizer
- Award: Winner, NEXUS Ideathon 2025
- Description: A GIS and AI-powered web dashboard assessing topological and spatial suitability for wind and solar installations using OpenStreetMap algorithms.
- Tech Stack: Flask, OpenStreetMap, TensorFlow, NumPy, Figma
- GitHub: https://github.com/ananyakalia/renewable-site-optimizer

### Fibonacci-Golden Ratio Research
- Award: Winner, Best Paper MULTICON 2025
- Description: A mathematical analysis paper assessing structural connections between Golden Ratio divisions and Fibonacci iterations, recognized for analytical insight.
- Tech Stack: Python, Analytical Modeling, Research, Fibonacci
- GitHub: https://github.com/ananyakalia/fibonacci-golden-ratio

### C++ & Java Core Systems
- Award: IIT Bombay FOSSEE Certification
- Description: Intermediate and advanced implementations of Object-Oriented structures, custom memory allocations, and algorithms. Scoring a verified 92.50%.
- Tech Stack: C++, Java, Data Structures, OOP, IIT Bombay
- GitHub: https://github.com/ananyakalia/core-systems-oop

## Experience & Certifications

### Co-Curator @ TEDxTCET (Oct 2024 - Present)
- Designed and refined speech flows, structural scripts, and visual delivery structures for speakers, ensuring TEDx standards.
- Engineered digital feedback systems to capture post-event survey data and speaker feedback.

### Event Coordinator @ CSI-TCET (Aug 2024 - Present)
- Supervised logistics, technical infrastructure, and coordinate teams for multiple collegiate hackathons.
- Scaled outreach and managed registrations via online developer channels.

### Certifications
- **IIT Bombay C++ Training** (Scored 92.50%): Completed memory allocation and structural OOP programming patterns.
- **MongoDB Academy Developer Certifications**: Validated database transaction mechanics, schema configurations, and query operations.
